name: Sour Cream Blueberry Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the first four ingredients (flour, white sugar, baking powder, and butter) together in a bowl until well combined.
2. Add the egg and vanilla to the mixture and stir until just incorporated.
3. Pour the batter into a 10-inch springform pan and spread evenly.
4. Arrange the blueberries on top of the cake batter.
5. In a separate bowl, mix the remaining ingredients (sour cream, white sugar, egg yolks, and vanilla).
6. Pour the mixed ingredients over the blueberries.
7. Bake at 375°F for approximately 60 to 70 minutes, or until the edges are lightly browned.
8. Serve with whipped cream.
